title: PvP Stats
description: PvP Stats is a client-side Fabric mod that tracks your PvP fights in real time, recording detailed combat stats like offense, defense, and shield interactions. Currently in beta with Tank kit support, with more kits coming soon.
body:
# PvP Stats

A client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that tracks and analyses your PvP fights in real time — no gameplay alteration, no assistance, just pure stats.

---

## 🗡️ What It Does

PvP Stats automatically detects when you enter a fight and begins tracking combat data live. When the fight ends, it saves a full breakdown to your fight history, which you can browse at any time.

---

## 📊 What It Tracks

- **Offense** — hits landed, damage dealt
- **Defense** — hits taken, damage received
- **Shield** — shield interactions and blocks
- **General** — fight duration, HP, and more
- **Kit-specific stats** — unique metrics depending on your loadout

![PvP Stats HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52be7feabba6a7c40e4070922004aa610a0da164.png)

---

## 🎒 Kit Support

PvP Stats automatically detects your kit based on your hotbar loadout.

| Kit | Status |
|-----|--------|
| Tank | ✅ Supported |
| Axe | ✅ Supported |
| SMP | ✅ Supported |
| Spearmace | ✅ Coming soon |
| Mace | 🔜 Coming soon |
| Cart | ✅ Coming soon |

---

## 🖥️ UI & Features

- Clean two-column stat display (offense, defense, shield, general, kit-specific)
- Browsable fight history — stores up to 50 past fights
- Debug overlay (press **H**) showing live kit, fight state, time elapsed, and a fade-out event feed

---

## ⚠️ Important

PvP Stats is **purely informational**. It does not alter gameplay, assist with inputs, automate anything, or provide any in-fight advantage. It only records and displays stats, and works on any server.

> **Note:** This mod is designed for **1v1 fights only**. Inaccurate recordings caused by FFAs, party games, party fights, or multi-player scenarios are **not covered by bug reports.**

---

## 🔧 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

---

> 🚧 This mod is currently in **beta**. More kits and features are actively in development.
